markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss GrowthX.ai's platform capabilities and potential partnership with Ambient.ai for content creation and marketing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai has developed a robust, AI-powered content creation platform with advanced workflows and customization options](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Ambient.ai needs scalable content creation with minimal in-house resources, aligning well with GrowthX.ai's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [The partnership would start with a strategy sprint to define objectives and customize workflows](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=37.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai can support various content types beyond just articles, including social media assets and data visualizations](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)

## Topics

### Ambient.ai's Current Marketing Situation

  - [Building marketing from the ground up with very little existing content](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Pressure to drive results quickly without months of team building](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Budget-conscious culture requiring quick value demonstration](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Desire for speed in content creation (e.g., generating articles in hours, not days)](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Video-centric product solution needing creative content integration](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)

### GrowthX.ai Platform Overview

  - [Developed own platform, moving away from Airtable Operations](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Uses AI coding agents for flexible, reusable workflows](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Handles complex tasks like fact-checking, internal linking, and style adaptation](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Processes about 1 million workflow runs per month across multiple brands](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1110.0)
  - [Allows for human-in-the-loop interventions at key stages](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Content Creation Capabilities

  - [Comprehensive strategy sprint to develop AI-ready artifacts and customized workflows](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Ability to generate various content types: articles, social media posts, infographics, charts](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Integration of brand messaging and product features into content](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Parallelized processing for faster content generation (e.g., fact-checking in minutes vs. hours)](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)

### Differentiation from Airtable Operations

  - [More flexible and scalable due to coding-based approach](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Easier to adapt to new AI models and APIs](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [Doesn't require full-time engineering support post-onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
  - [Provides ongoing support and optimization beyond initial setup](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)

### Engagement Structure

  - [Starts with an 8-week strategy sprint to develop key artifacts and customize workflows](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Execution phase follows, with flexibility to adjust based on needs identified in the sprint](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Weekly meetings, Slack communication, and shared Notion workspace for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1837.0)
  - [Currently using Google Docs for content review, transitioning to in-platform review soon](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX.ai to send Statement of Work (SOW) covering strategy sprint and execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=2082.0)
  - [Alberto to review budget requirements and plan accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=2058.0)
  - [Schedule kickoff for strategy sprint to allow GrowthX.ai team to begin pre-work](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai to provide more details on pricing and engagement structure](https://fathom.video/share/XzZCj4yDsTDKvCsfz24Eum3Cfspw-iM-?tab=summary&timestamp=2087.0)
